# Layout Grid

## Canvas
- width: 800
- height: 600
- scale assumption: 1:1
- margin: 40

## Grid Lines
| name | x | y | purpose |
| left | 40 | | margin |

## Region Boxes
| id | x | y | w | h |
| main | 40 | 40 | 720 | 520 |

## Repeated Components
| family | count | cell size | spacing | start x,y |
| sample | 2 | 100x40 | 20 | 100,100 |

## Drawing Order
1. background regions
2. containers
3. internal shapes
4. connectors
5. text
6. icons
7. highlights/overlays
